text: Brick and block making serves Uganda's construction boom. Two options: (1) Burnt clay bricks — traditional, requires kiln and clay soil. Startup: brick mould UGX 50,000, kiln construction UGX 200,000-500,000, clay sourcing. Sell at UGX 100-200/brick. Burn 5,000-10,000 bricks per kiln load. (2) Cement blocks — modern, faster, higher margin. Block-making machine (manual press UGX 300,000-600,000, semi-auto UGX 2,000,000+). Materials per block: cement + sand + aggregate ≈ UGX 1,500-2,000. Sell at UGX 3,000-4,500/block. A busy maker produces 200-500 blocks/day. Monthly revenue: UGX 1,500,000-5,000,000. Location: near construction sites, peri-urban areas with sand access. Key advantage: constant demand from housing construction.
